title: telemetry-otel — PHP attribute contracts
description: Every attribute is discovered at build time by the CompileInstrumentationRegistry listener. The compiler maps class::method → descriptor. Runtime instrumentation uses keepsuit facades under a decorator/aspect.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Param names to lift onto the span attributes. E.g. ['workspace_id', 'subscription_id']. Uses the method's parameter names.

params.name: sampling_priority
params.description: Override the sampler for this span. `always` = force-sample the whole trace.

params.name: amount
params.description: Fixed increment. Override via #[AsCounter(from: 'amount')] to lift from a method param.

params.name: from
params.description: Method param name whose value is used as the increment amount.

params.name: labels
params.description: Param names lifted to metric labels. Must be low-cardinality.

params.name: value
params.description: What to record. duration_ms is the method duration; return_value records the numeric return; from_param lifts a numeric param.

params.name: callback_mode
params.description: True = decorated method is invoked at scrape time. Method must return a number.

params.name: key
params.description: Span attribute key. Semantic convention: `<domain>.<field>` — e.g. `webhook.subscription_id`.

params.name: propagate_to_baggage
params.description: Also propagate this value via W3C Baggage — downstream services + async jobs see it.

params.name: cross_service
params.description: Propagate via HTTP header on outbound calls. Off for internal-only baggage.
